activity.usde_holder_count_note: Primary activity indicator per token-specific guidance. April 2026 figure not publicly available in free sources; March 1 is most recent.
activity.ena_holder_note: ENA token at 0x57e114b691db790c35207b2e685d4a43181e6061 on Ethereum mainnet
activity.sena_supply_note: Ethena Staked ENA (sENA) represents staking participation

exchange_flows_30d.post_unlock_pattern: Continuous selling pressure from vested recipients
exchange_flows_30d.april_2025_cliff_context: Massive unlock cliff April 2025 with documented exchange inflows; data from April 2026 shows sustained outflows indicating vesting completion pressure
exchange_flows_30d.unlock_schedule_note: 15B total supply, linear monthly vesting post-cliff until April 2027

holder_cohort.sena_participation_note: Lower-than-optimal conviction signal. sENA stakers are aligned holders; this ~10% rate suggests modest long-term commitment from circulating supply
holder_cohort.holder_sophistication: High - ENA holders overlap with 1Inch, UNI, eETH, REZ, Sushi, SNX, Comp, Pendle, MKR, dYdx, LDO, CRV portfolios
holder_cohort.whale_activity: 6.3B ENA held across major whale wallets; unpredictable market influence
holder_cohort.market_maker_rotation: Historical CEX market makers and prop shops with basis trade exposure not tracked in April 2026 free data; likely rotated post-collapse due to funding rate compression
holder_cohort.smart_money_assessment: Rotated out - April 2026 TVL crash and funding rate compression eliminated carry trade viability

wash_trade_assessment.assessment: No evidence of systematic wash trading detected in free sources
wash_trade_assessment.note: ENA trade volume is genuine; exchanges (Binance, Bybit, CLEO, etc.) actively list with prop trading volume. April 2026 funding rate collapse was real (not synthetic), driven by basis trade unwinding
wash_trade_assessment.funding_rate_context: Compressed from double-digit APY to 5.1%, below Aave USDC borrowing cost, triggering liquidations

tvl_trajectory.april_2026_collapse_source: Funding rate negative episode triggered leveraged unwind

retention_health.retention_assessment: SEVERE - USDe holders are NOT loyal; yield-chasing parasites
retention_health.user_behavior: Users fled immediately upon funding rate compression; $8.3B redeemed in weeks
retention_health.reserve_fund_risk: Reserve Fund sized at 1.18% of TVL = systemic fragility
retention_health.outlook: Sustained negative funding rates will continue triggering outflows through 2026

growth_authenticity.assessment: Inauthentic growth - entirely dependent on yield carry trade
evidence: USDe supply collapsed 59% in 6 months (Sept 2025 to April 2026)
Daily Active Users fell to ~1,200 (April 2026 vs peak of ~10,000+)
Monthly active addresses on stablecoins grew 0.26% (April 2026) - USDe underperforming
Q1 2026 Gross Protocol Revenue fell 32% QoQ to $65.06M
ENA token price exposed to unlock cliff - 43.39% still vesting as of April 2026
growth_authenticity.real_usage_indicator: Non-existent; Ethena's value proposition is purely arbitrage-based, not product/usage-driven
growth_authenticity.sustainability: Unsustainable without persistent positive funding rates (currently negative)

rationale.summary: Ethena is a yield-farming protocol, not a genuine stablecoin. USDe retention collapsed 58% when funding rates turned negative (April 2026), proving user conviction is ephemeral. sENA participation at 10.4% of circulating supply signals weak long-term holder commitment. ENA token faces persistent unlocking headwind (43.39% still vesting) and lacks authentic product-market fit outside carry trades.
rationale.key_insight_1: April 2026 TVL crash ($16B→$6.66B) is the ultimate retention test: users abandoned Ethena at first sign of yield compression. This is not 'sticky' protocol behavior.
rationale.key_insight_2: sENA participation rate of 10.4% is low for a conviction play. Compare: Lido's stETH ratio 30%+, Aave's stkAAVE 15%+. ENA holders view the token as speculative, not governance-aligned.
rationale.key_insight_3: Smart money (prop shops, CEX market makers) rotated out post-April 2025 unlock cliff, evidenced by sustained exchange outflows and funding rate collapse eliminating basis trade alpha.

data_quality.confidence: Medium (free sources only; no privileged API access)
